---
id: get-header-auth
title: "Authenticate using configured HTTP request headers."
description: "Reads credentials and connection metadata from configured request headers. The default header names are documented as parameters; they can be changed through the Nauthilus runtime configuration."
sidebar_label: "Authenticate using configured HTTP request headers."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/management/nauthilus-management-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Authenticate using configured HTTP request headers."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/auth/header"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Reads credentials and connection metadata from configured request headers. The default header names are documented as parameters; they can be changed through the Nauthilus runtime configuration.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
